flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bowdoin College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (88.5% → 72.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bowdoin College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.8k → $18.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bowdoin College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.3k → $67.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bowdoin College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.3k → $67.8k).
